testcase.name: test_auth_works

failure.message: AssertionError: No token in response assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJkaXBhbGlAY2x1YmNvbmNpZXJnZS5pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJ1c2VyIiwiZXhwIjoxNzcxNTMxMjAwfQ.5xq-MzrkZAbgU6FKQB-SdOn7Tz77LzRf53vjIqq3nSk', 'message': 'Login successful', 'mira_access': {'allowed': True, 'limit': 3, 'message': None, 'priority': False, ...}, 'token_type': 'bearer', ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_soul_first_integration.py:57: in test_auth_works assert "token" in data, "No token in response" E AssertionError: No token in response E assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJkaXBhbGlAY2x1YmNvbmNpZXJnZS5pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJ1c2VyIiwiZXhwIjoxNzcxNTMxMjAwfQ.5xq-MzrkZAbgU6FKQB-SdOn7Tz77LzRf53vjIqq3nSk', 'message': 'Login successful', 'mira_access': {'allowed': True, 'limit': 3, 'message': None, 'priority': False, ...}, 'token_type': 'bearer', ...}
